ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shoe_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shoe size entry */,
  "demographic" TEXT /* Demographic type (women's, men's, kids') */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the shoe size */,
  "size_category" TEXT /* Category of the shoe size (athletic, casual, formal) */,
  "us_women" REAL /* Shoe size for women's in US standards */,
  "us_men" REAL /* Shoe size for men's in US standards */,
  "us_kids" TEXT /* Shoe size for kids in US standards */,
  "uk_size" REAL /* Shoe size in UK standards */,
  "canadian_size" REAL /* Shoe size in Canadian standards */,
  "eu_size" REAL /* Shoe size in EU standards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shoe size */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the shoes are available */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shoes available for the specified size */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the shoes */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the shoes */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last restocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES shoe_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the store */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the store */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the store is located */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's email address is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (pending, shipped, delivered, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_user" (
  "role_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-user association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_user_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)
